items.title: Asked Keaton Wagler about the weirdest question he got during pre-draft:
items.author: Tomer Azarly
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Keaton Wagler about the weirdest question he got during pre-draft:

“1 team that put up pictures of me and my family, and a couple of them just weren't even my family. I was like, ‘that’s weird.’ They asked, ‘who are these people?’ and I was like, ‘I actually don't know who those people are.’"

items.title: In tonight's second round of the 2026 NBA Draft, only four teams hold their original draft pick:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
In tonight's second round of the 2026 NBA Draft, only four teams hold their original draft pick:

Orlando Magic - #46
Toronto Raptors - #50
Houston Rockets - #53
New York Knicks - #55

All 26 other second-round picks have changed hands at least once leading up to tonight.

items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
The Pacers did not have a first-round pick for the third straight year, making for a quiet opening night of the NBA Draft.

But with this front office, the possibility of trading into the Day 2 is always worth watching.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/pacers-202...

items.title: Rookie seasons of the previous #5 overall picks
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Rookie seasons of the previous #5 overall picks

2016: Kris Dunn (backup SG, no All-Rookie)
2017: De'Aaron Fox (starting PG, no All-Rookie)
2018: Trae Young (starting PG, ROY runner up)
2019: Darius Garland (starting PG, no All-Rookie)
2020: Isaac Okoro (starting SF, All-Rookie 2nd)

items.title: Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon’s draft day began with an early-morning music session. He stayed focused on “the main thing” as others were picked. He was still moving through Barclays Center after midnight.

It was all worth the wait.

“Being able to hear your name is everything.” 

www.inquirer.com/sixers/2026-...

media.title: Inside Labaron Philon Jr.’s draft night and unexpected fall to the ‘perfect spot’ with the Sixers
media.description: Philon delayed his draft night a year after originally declaring in 2025, then waited longer than expected to be selected by the Sixers at No. 22. But he believes it was worth the wait.

items.title: Pacers quiet on night 1 of 2026 NBA Draft, but trade-in option remains
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: The NBA wrapped up the first round of the 2026 Draft shortly before 11:30 p.m. ET on Tuesday. And for the third year in a row, the Pacers did not have a Day 1 selection. For the third straight year, the league has made it a two-day event. That’s good for fans, and especially…
